pdf_excerpt_evidence: Row 2: ABC | AG | ABC-001 | AGSEQ | 1 | (empty RELTYPE) | R1 — relrec.xpt SR/AG row 2 verbatim match
p.382 §7.1.2 opening: A clinical trial is a scientific experiment involving human subjects, intended to address certain scientific questions

findings: Cell-internal bullet structure flattened: PDF Treatments cell has 3 explicit bullets (Because epochs.. / A study cell.. / An element..) but atom concatenates without bullet markers or boundary separators. Minor format normalization for table cell prose.
pdf_excerpt_evidence: p.383 Treatments row Definition cell with 3 bullets: Because epochs cut across arms / A study cell treatment is specific / An element treatment may be fairly detailed
p.384 §7.1.3 prose: The Inclusion/Exclusion Criteria Not Met (IE) domain described in Section 6.3.4, Inclusion/Exclusion Criteria Not Met, contains the actual exceptions
p.385 ta.xpt spec ELEMENT row: Description of Element | Char | * | Synonym Qualifier | The name of the element. The same element may occur more than once within an arm. | Perm

findings: Sentence-not-paragraph rule violation: atom concatenates 3 sentences (When working out... / The protocol may include... / Such a diagram can then...) into single SENTENCE atom. Per schema notes line 180 each sentence should be its own atom.
pdf_excerpt_evidence: p.386 TA Examples paragraph: When working out the design of a trial, it is generally useful to draw diagrams such as those mentioned in ICH E3. The protocol may include a diagram
p.387 bullets list: A trial design matrix... / The TA dataset (last bullet of bulleted enumeration of figures and elements)

findings: Sentence-not-paragraph rule violation: atom concatenates 3 sentences (The next diagram shows... / To blinded participants... / They know when...) into single SENTENCE atom. Same paragraph-collapse motif as atom 6.
pdf_excerpt_evidence: Example Trial 1 blinded view paragraph: The next diagram shows the trial from the viewpoint of blinded participants. To blinded participants in this trial, all arms look alike.

findings: Sentence-not-paragraph rule violation: atom concatenates 5+ sentences (The following diagram... / Slanted lines are used... / As in most crossover... / Note that even though... / Also note that... / Elements are conceived...) into single SENTENCE atom. Most severe granularity collapse in sample.
pdf_excerpt_evidence: Example 2 intro paragraph: The following diagram for a crossover trial does not use the crossing slanted lines sometimes used to represent crossover trials, because the order of the blocks is sufficient
